in_progress.title: T-007 — Admin-only restriction on provider switcher API
in_progress.manager_instruction: src/app/api/admin/auth-provider/route.ts — POST must verify caller is org admin before allowing provider switch. Clerk: check orgRole === 'org:admin' from clerkAuth(). Authentik: query organization_member where userId=session.user.id AND role IN ('admin','owner'). Return 403 if not admin. This is a security fix with no T-001 gate — ship it.

in_progress.title: T-010 — Verify and fix last-admin guard in members API
in_progress.manager_instruction: Review src/app/api/admin/members/[memberId]/route.ts — confirm the last-admin guard is correct for both Clerk and Authentik paths. Log findings in BUILD_LOG.md. Fix anything missing or incorrect.
